name: Fresh Corn Bisque with Green Onions
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Clove garlic, minced (or 1/4 tsp garlic powder)
1 tbsp Chopped green onions (or 1 tb fresh parsley, or 1 ts dry parsley)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, heat oil over medium heat.
2. Add onion, carrot, celery, and garlic; cook, stirring for 2 minutes.
3. Stir in turmeric and cook for an additional minute.
4. Add bay leaf and water, then bring to a simmer.
5. Add corn and simmer for 10 minutes. Discard the bay leaf.
6. Taste and adjust seasoning with salt and cayenne pepper as desired.
7. Serve hot or cold, garnished with chopped green onions, fresh parsley, or dried parsley. Makes about 1 1/3 cups (91 calories per serving).
